coverage_note: The bundled BRCA2 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from BRCA2 RAD51 loading, homologous recombination repair, replication-fork protection, and hereditary cancer biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000139618: BRCA2 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: BRCA2 findings should be read against RAD51 loading, homologous recombination repair, replication-fork protection, and hereditary cancer biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

BRCA2 c.5946delT / 6174delT model is curated as a BRCA2 marker for Hereditary breast/ovarian/pancreatic/prostate cancer context, Homologous recombination deficiency; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

BRCA2 loss-of-function model is curated as a BRCA2 marker for Hereditary breast/ovarian/pancreatic/prostate cancer context, Homologous recombination deficiency; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
